title: mentha satureioides
intro: Mentha satureioides, also known as pennyroyal, is a perennial herb native to Europe and the Mediterranean region. It possesses carminative and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating digestive issues and menstrual cramps. The health benefits of pennyroyal include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression. In herbal preparations, pennyroyal is often used in teas, essential oils, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
